sources.title: The oldest forms of human communication

slides.heading: Ukuxhumana Ngokuhamba Kwesikhathi
slides.lead: Kusukela ezigubhini nasezimpawini zentuthu kudala, kuya ezincwadini, ocingweni, umsakazweni nase-inthanethini namuhla.

image.alt: Isigubhu, incwadi, ucingo oludala neselula kulandelana, kukhombisa ukuthi ukuxhumana kushintshe kanjani ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 160' role='img'><rect width='320' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M28 96 q26 -18 52 0 v20 q-26 16 -52 0 Z' fill='#8a4b2a'/><ellipse cx='54' cy='96' rx='26' ry='9' fill='#c8853a'/><rect x='108' y='84' width='52' height='38' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M108 84 L134 104 L160 84' fill='none' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='188' y='80' width='40' height='44' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='196' y='70' width='24' height='14' rx='7' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='208' cy='108' r='6' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='260' y='72' width='30' height='54' rx='5' fill='#333'/><rect x='264' y='80' width='22' height='34' fill='#8fd0e8'/><circle cx='275' cy='120' r='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yamukela ikilasi. Buza abafundi ukuthi bebengamtshela kanjani umngane okude izindaba ezinhle namuhla (ngocingo, ngomlayezo obhaliwe, noma ngevidiyo). Chaza ukuthi ukuxhumana kusho ukwabelana ngolwazi, nokuthi abantu bebehlale bekudinga lokhu - kodwa amathuluzi ashintshe kakhulu. Namuhla sihamba kusukela ezindleleni ezindala zokuxhumana kuze kufike ku-inthanethi.

slides.heading: Yini ukuxhumana?
slides.lead: Ukuxhumana yindlela esabelana ngayo ngolwazi nabanye abantu.

blocks.text: Nsuku zonke **sabelana ngolwazi** nabanye. Siyakhuluma, siyalalela, siyabhala futhi siyafunda. Sisebenzisa nezithombe, izimpawu nemisindo. Konke lokhu izindlela zokuxhumana.

items: Sixhumana ukuze sicele usizo futhi sigcinane siphephile.
Sixhumana ukuze sabelane ngezindaba, izindatshana nemizwa.
Sixhumana ukuze sifunde kwabanye abantu futhi sibafundise.

slides.notes: Gcina lokhu kucacile. Nikeza izibonelo ezilula: umama obiza ingane ukuze idle isidlo sakusihlwa, uthisha obhala ebhodini, umngane oshaya isandla ekubingeleleni. Veza ukuthi ukuxhumana kudinga umuntu othumela umlayezo nomuntu owamukelayo. Cela abafundi baqambe izindlela ezintathu abaxhumane ngazo ngaphambi kokuza esikoleni namuhla.

slides.heading: Ukukhuluma nokuxoxa izindaba
slides.lead: Kudala, ngaphambi kokubhala, abantu babelana ngakho konke ngokukhuluma.

blocks.text: Indlela endala kunazo zonke yokuxhumana **ukukhuluma nokulalela**. Abadala babexoxela izingane izindaba ukuze bazifundise ngomndeni wazo, umlando wazo nendlela yokuphila kahle. Lokhu kubizwa ngokuthi **isiko lomlomo** - ukudlulisela ulwazi ngomlomo.

items: Izindatshana, izingoma nezibongo zazikhunjulwa futhi zixoxwe kaninginingi.
AbeSan nabaKhoi baseNingizimu Afrika badlulisela umlando wabo ngale ndlela.
Olunye ulwazi alukaze lubhalwe phansi, kodwa alulahlekanga - lwalukhunjulwa futhi lwabelwane ngalo.

image.alt: Abantu behlezi bezungeze umlilo kuthi umuntu oyedwa axoxe indaba.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M96 118 q14 -30 28 0 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M104 118 q6 -18 12 0 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='50' cy='70' r='11'/><rect x='43' y='82' width='14' height='30' rx='4'/><circle cx='170' cy='70' r='11'/><rect x='163' y='82' width='14' height='30' rx='4'/><circle cx='40' cy='108' r='10'/><circle cx='180' cy='108' r='10'/></g><rect x='20' y='126' width='180' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcizelela ukuthi isiko lomlomo yindlela yangempela nethenjwayo yokugcina umlando, hhayi encane. Qaphela iphuzu le-SAHO lokuthi abokufika baseYurophu bokuqala babecabanga ngokungeyikho ukuthi uma kungekho izincwadi, wawungekho umlando - kodwa umlando wase-Afrika wawugcinwa ngokucophelela ezindabeni, ezinkumbulweni nasemasikweni adluliselwa ngabadala. Buza abafundi ukuthi imindeni yabo ixoxa iziphi izindaba.

slides.heading: Izigubhu, intuthu nezimpawu
slides.lead: Uwuthumela kanjani umlayezo kubantu abakude kakhulu ukuba bezwe izwi lakho?

blocks.text: Kudala, abantu bathola izindlela ezihlakaniphile zokuthumela imilayezo emibangweni emide. **Izigubhu** zazishaywa ngamaphethini akhethekile, futhi iphethini ngalinye litshele omakhelwane ngezindaba noma ngengozi. **Izimpawu zentuthu** nemililo kwakubonakala kude futhi kuxwayise abantu ngezinto okwakumele bazazi.

items: Amaphethini ezigubhu ayengaxwayisa umuzi ukuthi kufika izivakashi noma ingozi.
Intuthu emini nomlilo ebusuku kwakubonakala emibangweni emide.
Izithunywa nazo zazigijima noma zigibele ukuze zithwale amazwi abalulekile zisuka kwenye indawo ziye kwenye.

image.alt: Igquma elinomlilo othumela izimpawu zentuthu esibhakabhakeni.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M0 130 L70 96 L120 118 L180 92 L220 116 L220 130 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M96 120 q14 -22 26 0 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M100 120 q9 -12 18 0 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#b7a98d'><circle cx='109' cy='86' r='9'/><circle cx='118' cy='68' r='11'/><circle cx='104' cy='52' r='13'/><circle cx='120' cy='36' r='15'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza lokhu kucace futhi kubandakanye - ungashaya isigqi esilula bese ubuza ukuthi ikilasi lingakwazi yini 'ukufunda' iphethini eliphindaphindwayo. Chaza ukuthi lezi zimpawu zazisebenza ngoba wonke umuntu emphakathini wayevumelana ngokuthi iphethini noma uphawu ngalunye lusho ukuthini. Lokhu kusayiqiniso nanamuhla: ukuxhumana kusebenza kuphela uma sabelana ngekhodi, njengolimi.

slides.heading: Izithombe emadwaleni
slides.lead: Eminye yemilayezo emidala kunayo yonke eNingizimu Afrika yayidwetshwe emadwaleni.

blocks.text: AbeSan babedweba futhi baqophe izithombe emadwaleni nasezindongeni zemihume. Lo **msebenzi wobuciko basemadwaleni** wawukhombisa izilwane, ukuzingela nezehlakalo ezibalulekile. Izithombe zazabelana ngemibono nangezindaba, futhi eziningi zazo zisabonakala nanamuhla, ngemva kweminyaka eyizinkulungwane.

items: Ubuciko basemadwaleni bungenye yezindlela ezindala kunazo zonke zokuxhumana okuqoshiwe.
Izithombe zisitshela ngezilwane, izinkolelo nezimpilo zamaciko.
Ngoba wawudwetshwe etsheni, umlayezo wahlala isikhathi eside kakhulu.

image.alt: Udonga lwedwala olunezithombe ezidwetshiwe zabantu abazingela inyamazane.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 0 h220 v160 h-220 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#8a3b1f'><path d='M140 70 q18 -10 34 0 l-4 14 h-8 v18 h-6 v-16 h-8 v16 h-6 v-18 h-4 Z'/><circle cx='157' cy='60' r='6'/><path d='M138 96 l-6 10 M176 96 l6 10' stroke='#8a3b1f' stroke-width='3'/></g><g fill='#5c1414'><circle cx='58' cy='72' r='5'/><rect x='55' y='78' width='6' height='20'/><path d='M55 84 l-12 6 M61 84 l12 -6' stroke='#5c1414' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M55 98 l-8 14 M61 98 l8 14' stroke='#5c1414' stroke-width='3'/></g><circle cx='92' cy='70' r='5' fill='#5c1414'/><rect x='89' y='76' width='6' height='20' fill='#5c1414'/></svg>

slides.notes: Xhumanisa ubuciko basemadwaleni nomqondo wokuqopha umlayezo ukuze uhlale. Ngokungafani nezwi elikhulunywayo elinyamalalayo, isithombe edwaleni siyahlala. Lesi yisinyathelo sokuqala esiya ekubhaleni. Uma indawo yakho inezindawo zobuciko basemadwaleni ezaziwayo, zibalule. Hlonipha: lezi yizindawo zamagugu ezibalulekile okumele zivikelwe.

slides.heading: Ukukubhala phansi
slides.lead: Abantu bafunda ukuguqula imisindo nemibono ibe yizimpawu esizibiza ngokuthi ukubhala.

blocks.text: Eminyakeni eyizinkulungwane eyedlule, abantu abanjengama**Gibhithe** asendulo baqala ukusebenzisa izimpawu ukumela izinto nemisindo. Ngokuhamba kwesikhathi eside lezi zimpawu zakhula zaba **izinhlamvu zamagama** - amaqoqo amancane ezinhlamvu esizihlanganisa ndawonye ukwenza amagama. Ukubhala kwenza abantu bakwazi ukugcina amarekhodi nokuthumela imilayezo enembile.

items: Ukubhala kusho ukuthi umlayezo ungagcinwa futhi ufundwe futhi kamuva.
Uhlu lwezinhlamvu lusebenzisa izinhlamvu ezimbalwa nje ukubhala noma yiliphi igama.
Abantu babebhala ebumbeni, etsheni, ezikhumbeni zezilwane, futhi kamuva naphepheni.

image.alt: Umqulu wephepha onezinhlamvu zohlu lwezinhlamvu nepeni losiba.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='50' y='34' width='96' height='96' rx='6' fill='#efe6d2' stroke='#b7a98d' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='64' y='52' width='68' height='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><rect x='64' y='68' width='68' height='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><rect x='64' y='84' width='52' height='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><rect x='64' y='100' width='60' height='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><path d='M150 40 L184 74 L176 82 L142 48 Z' fill='#2f5233'/><path d='M142 48 L150 40 L156 46 L148 54 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yigcine ilula: ukubhala yindlela yokudweba amagama ethu ukuze ahlale futhi ahambe. Qhathanisa namaslayidi angaphambili - indaba ingakhohlakala noma ishintshe njalo lapho ixoxwa, kodwa ukubhala kugcina amagama afanayo. Ungakhombisa ikilasi ukuthi igama labo uqobo liwuhlu lwezinhlamvu zamagama. Leli slayidi lixhumanisa umhlaba omdala namathuluzi anamuhla alandelayo.

slides.heading: Ukunyathelisa izincwadi namaphephandaba
slides.lead: Isikhathi eside incwadi ngayinye kwakumele ikotshwe ngesandla, eyodwa ngesikhathi.

blocks.text: Cishe eminyakeni engama-600 eyedlule kwasungulwa umshini obizwa ngokuthi **isicindezelo sokunyathelisa**. Wawukwazi ukunyathelisa ikhasi elifanayo izikhathi eziningi, ngokushesha. Manje izincwadi **namaphephandaba** kwakungenziwa ngobuningi, ngakho abantu abaningi kakhulu babengafunda ulwazi olufanayo.

items: Ngaphambi kokunyathelisa, izincwadi zazingavamile futhi zibiza kakhulu.
Ukunyathelisa kwenza izincwadi zaba shibhile, ngakho abantu abaningi bafunda ukufunda.
Amaphephandaba avumela abantu abaningi ukuba babelane ngezindaba ezifanayo ngesikhathi esisodwa.

image.alt: Inqwaba yezincwadi ezinyathelisiwe eduze kwephephandaba eligoqiwe.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='36' y='96' width='70' height='16' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='40' y='80' width='70' height='16' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='36' y='64' width='70' height='16' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='40' y='48' width='70' height='16' fill='#3f6b45'/><rect x='128' y='52' width='60' height='72' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='136' y='60' width='44' height='8' fill='#333'/><rect x='136' y='74' width='20' height='30' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='160' y='74' width='20' height='6' fill='#999'/><rect x='160' y='84' width='20' height='6' fill='#999'/><rect x='160' y='94' width='20' height='6' fill='#999'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcizelela ushintsho olukhulu: ukunyathelisa kwavumela ulwazi ukuba lusabalale kubantu abaningi ngesikhathi esisodwa, hhayi nje kubambalwa ababenezincwadi ezakotshwa ngesandla. Buza abafundi ukuthi basawabona kuphi amagama anyathelisiwe namuhla (izincwadi, amaphephandaba, amabhokisi okudla kwasekuseni, amaphosta). Qaphela ukuthi lokhu kwenza ukufunda nezindaba zatholakala kubantu abaningi kakhulu.

slides.heading: Iposi: izincwadi zihamba kude
slides.lead: Uwathumela kanjani amagama akho kumuntu okwenye idolobha?

blocks.text: Abantu babhala **izincwadi** bazithumela ngohlelo **lweposi**. Izincwadi zazithwalwa abantu ngezinyawo, ngamahhashi, ngemikhumbi, kamuva ngesitimela nangebhanoyi. Incwadi yayingathwala amagama akho aqondile iwayise emndenini nakubangane abakude.

items: Ufaka incwadi emvilophini bese wengeza isitembu nekheli.
Ihhovisi leposi liqoqa izincwadi lizithumele endaweni efanele.
Incwadi yayingathatha izinsuku noma amasonto ukufika endaweni ekude.

image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='120' y='56' width='56' height='84' rx='8' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='128' y='66' width='40' height='8' rx='2' fill='#2b0d0d'/><rect x='106' y='40' width='40' height='28' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2' transform='rotate(-14 126 54)'/><rect x='128' y='34' width='12' height='12' fill='#e8a13a' transform='rotate(-14 134 40)'/><path d='M106 46 L126 60 L146 46' fill='none' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2' transform='rotate(-14 126 54)'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza uhlelo lweposi lubonakale luyiqiniso - abafundi abaningi basengase bathole amaphasela. Veza ikheli nesitembu 'njengekhodi' eyenza incwadi ifike ekhaya elifanele. Qhathanisa isikhathi sokulinda (izinsuku noma amasonto) nemilayezo yesikhathi samanje esheshayo, okuyisixhumanisi esihle kumaslayidi alandelayo.

slides.heading: Itheligrafu nocingo
slides.lead: Imishini emisha yenza imilayezo ihambe cishe njengombani, ilandela izintambo.

blocks.text: **Itheligrafu** yayithumela imilayezo njengezimpawu ezimfushane nezinde ezintanjeni isebenzisa ikhodi ekhethekile. Kwabe sekuthi **ucingo**, olwasungulwa ngo-1876, lwenza abantu bezwe amazwi omunye nomunye emibangweni emide. Okokuqala ngqa wawungakhuluma nomuntu okude ngaso leso sikhathi.

items: Itheligrafu yayithumela imilayezo ngekhodi yamachashazi nemidwa.
Ucingo lwenza abantu bakhulume balalele ngesikhathi sangempela.
Le mishini yenza ukuxhumana kwashesha kakhulu kunencwadi.

image.alt: Ucingo oludala olunesibambo phezulu nesidayela ngaphambili.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='60' y='78' width='80' height='56' rx='8' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='100' cy='108' r='16' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='100' cy='108' r='7' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='58' y='60' width='84' height='16' rx='8' fill='#1f3a24'/><path d='M58 68 q-14 -2 -14 12 M142 68 q14 -2 14 12' stroke='#1f3a24' stroke-width='6' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M140 120 q30 6 34 30' fill='none' stroke='#333' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Izinga lebanga 4: gxila embonweni omkhulu wokuthi amazwi manje ayengahamba kude ngezintambo. Ungabalula u-Alexander Graham Bell njengomuntu oxhunywa nocingo ngo-1876. [SME] Qinisekisa usuku lokwethulwa kocingo netheligrafu eNingizimu Afrika uma usuku lwendawo ludingeka. Cela abafundi bacabange bezwa izwi likamkhulu noma likagogo okokuqala ngqa livela kude.

slides.heading: Umsakazo nomabonakude
slides.lead: Manje imilayezo yayingafinyelela ezinkulungwaneni zabantu ngasikhathi sinye, ngaphandle kwezintambo.

blocks.text: **Umsakazo** uthumela umsindo emoyeni, ngakho abantu abaningi bangalalela izindaba ezifanayo, umculo nezindatshana ngasikhathi sinye. Kamuva, **umabonakude** wengeza izithombe ezinyakazayo emsindweni. ENingizimu Afrika, ukusakaza komsakazo kwaqala ngeminyaka yama-1930 kanti umabonakude waqala ngo-1976.

items: Umsakazo waletha izindaba, umculo nezemidlalo emakhaya abantu.
Umabonakude wengeza izithombe, ngakho sasingabona izehlakalo futhi sizizwe.
Ukusakaza okukodwa kwakungafinyelela abantu abaningi ezweni lonke ngasikhathi sinye.

image.alt: Umsakazo omdala onezidayela nesethi kamabonakude ekhombisa amagagasi aphuma ku-eriyeli.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='24' y='70' width='72' height='60' rx='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><circle cx='44' cy='100' r='12' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='62' y='84' width='26' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='62' y='96' width='26' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='62' y='108' width='26' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='120' y='74' width='76' height='56' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='128' y='82' width='60' height='40' fill='#8fd0e8'/><path d='M158 74 L150 50 M158 74 L172 52' stroke='#333' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M150 44 q6 4 8 0 M144 40 q12 8 20 0' fill='none' stroke='#e8a13a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gqamisa ukweqa ekusakazeni: umlayezo owodwa ofinyelela izinkulungwane ngasikhathi sinye. [SME] Qinisekisa izinsuku zokusakaza zaseNingizimu Afrika - ukusakaza komsakazo eNingizimu Afrika ngokuvamile kubalwa eminyakeni yama-1920 kuya kwama-1930 (i-SABC yasungulwa ngo-1936) kanti umabonakude kazwelonke waqala ngo-1976; qinisekisa indlela eqondile ngaphambi kokukhiqiza. Buza abafundi ukuthi yikuphi abakusebenzisa kakhulu namuhla, umsakazo noma umabonakude, futhi kungani.

slides.heading: Amakhompyutha, i-inthanethi namaselula
slides.lead: Namuhla singathumela amagama, izithombe namazwi emhlabeni wonke ngemizuzwana.

blocks.text: **Amakhompyutha** ne-**inthanethi** kuxhumanisa abantu emhlabeni wonke. Sithumela ama-imeyili nemilayezo, sabelane ngezithombe futhi senze izingcingo zevidiyo emndenini kwamanye amazwe. **Amaselula** enza sikwazi ukwenza konke lokhu sisemaphaketheni ethu, cishe noma kuphi lapho siya khona.

items: I-inthanethi isenza sikwazi ukuthumela umlayezo emhlabeni wonke ngemizuzwana.
Iselula lingashaya ucingo, lithumele umbhalo, lithathe izithombe futhi liye ku-inthanethi.
Manje singabona futhi sizwe abantu abakude ngaso leso sikhathi esisodwa.

image.alt: Ikhompyutha ephathekayo neselula elinebhamuza lenkulumo elikhombisa ukuthi kuxhunyiwe.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='56' width='84' height='54' rx='4' fill='#333'/><rect x='36' y='62' width='72' height='42' fill='#8fd0e8'/><path d='M24 110 h96 l8 12 h-112 Z' fill='#666'/><rect x='168' y='50' width='40' height='68' rx='6' fill='#333'/><rect x='172' y='58' width='32' height='48' fill='#8fd0e8'/><circle cx='188' cy='112' r='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/><path d='M120 60 q28 -18 44 6' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/><circle cx='142' cy='48' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Kuletshe ezimpilweni zabafundi uqobo - abaningi bazowazi kahle amaselula ne-inthanethi. Qaphela ukuthi i-inthanethi yasetshenziswa kabanzi ngeminyaka yama-1990 kanti namaselula avamile eNingizimu Afrika ngeminyaka yama-1990 futhi. [SME] Qinisekisa indlela eqondile yokwethulwa kwamaselula eNingizimu Afrika (amanethiwekhi eselula aqala ngo-1994) uma kusetshenziswa usuku. Buza: yini iselula elingayenza incwadi engeke ikwazi, futhi yini incwadi esengayenza kahle?

slides.heading: Ukuxhumana ngokuhamba kwesikhathi

blocks.alt: Uhlu lwesikhathi lokuxhumana kusukela ekuxoxweni kwezindaba ngomlomo nasebucikweni basemadwaleni, kudlula ekubhaleni, ekunyatheliseni, eposini, ocingweni, emsakazweni, kumabonakude nase-inthanethini.

events.label: Ukukhuluma, ukuxoxa izindaba, izigubhu nezimpawu zentuthu
Ukusakaza komsakazo kufinyelela emakhaya aseNingizimu Afrika

slides.notes: Sebenzisa leli slayidi ukubukeza uhambo lonke ngokulandelana. Veza iphethini: ekuqaleni imilayezo yayihamba kancane ifinyelele abantu abambalwa, kuthi ngokuhamba kwesikhathi yaba sheshayo yafinyelela abantu abaningi. [SME] Izinsuku zomsakazo zama-1930 nesicindezelo sokunyathelisa sango-1440 yizinsuku zokufundisa ezilinganiselwe - qinisekisa ngaphambi kokukhiqiza. Buza abafundi ukuthi yiluphi usungulo abacabanga ukuthi lwashintsha izimpilo zabantu kakhulu.

slides.heading: Yini eshintshile, nokusale kufana
slides.lead: Amathuluzi ashintshe kakhulu, kodwa isizathu sokuthi sixhumane sihlale sifana.

blocks.heading: Kusafana
blocks.text: Sisaxhumana ukuze sabelane ngezindaba, sicele usizo, futhi sihlale seduze nabantu esibathandayo.

blocks.heading: Kusheshe kakhulu
blocks.text: Umlayezo owawuthatha amasonto ngencwadi manje uthatha imizuzwana nje ku-inthanethi.

blocks.heading: Kufinyelela abantu abaningi
blocks.text: Isigubhu sasifinyelela umuzi owodwa; i-inthanethi ingafinyelela umhlaba wonke.

slides.notes: Veza umqondo we-CAPS woshintsho nokuqhubeka. Okushintshile: ijubane, ibanga nenani labantu esingafinyelela kubo. Okusale kufana: isidingo somuntu sokwabelana ngolwazi nokuhlala uxhumene. Lokhu kusiza abafundi babone umlando njengoshintsho nezinto eziqhubekayo ngokufanayo. Mema izibonelo ezivela emindenini yabo.

slides.heading: Ake sihlole esikufundile
slides.lead: Ukuxhumana kukhulile kusukela ezindabeni ezikhulunywayo nasezigubhini kuze kufike ku-inthanethi - kodwa injongo yakho ihlala ifana.

blocks.text: Sihambe kusukela **ekukhulumeni, ezigubhini nasezimpawini zentuthu**, kuya **ebucikweni basemadwaleni nasekubhaleni**, kuya **ekunyatheliseni, eposini, ocingweni, emsakazweni, kumabonakude** futhi ekugcineni **i-inthanethi namaselula**. Ithuluzi ngalinye elisha lenza imilayezo yahamba ngokushesha yafinyelela abantu abaningi.

blocks.question: Qamba izindlela ezimbili abantu ababexhumana ngazo kudala, ngaphambi kokubhala.
Chaza ukuthi ucingo lwaguqula kanjani indlela abantu ababexhumana ngayo.
Khetha ithuluzi elilodwa lesimanje (umsakazo, umabonakude, i-inthanethi noma iselula) bese usho ukuthi kungani liwusizo.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengokubukeza okukhulunywayo noma okubhaliwe. Izimpendulo eziphakanyisiwe: (1) noma yiziphi ezimbili kokukhuluma/ukuxoxa izindaba, izigubhu, izimpawu zentuthu, izithunywa, ubuciko basemadwaleni; (2) lwenza abantu bezwe amazwi omunye nomunye emibangweni emide, ngaso leso sikhathi, esikhundleni sokulinda incwadi; (3) yamukela noma yisiphi isizathu esinengqondo - lifinyelela abantu abaningi, ngokushesha, liletha izindaba futhi lisenza sihlale sixhumene. Phetha ngokucela abafundi bacabange ukuthi ukuxhumana kungabukeka kanjani lapho sebekhulile.
